_notes.managers: PUBLIC REPO: placeholder names only. Put the real 26/27 roster in a gitignored league.config.local.json (same shape) on the machine running the draft; it overrides this. Manager count derives from the array length.
_notes.squad: Sums to 15. Position keys map to FPL element_type: GK=1, DEF=2, MID=3, FWD=4.
_notes.multipick: false = exclusive ownership (one manager per player). EPL Como has no multipick (that was a WC FIFA-cap artifact).
_notes.rebidRounds: Reserved for the deferred rebid feature; not used in v1.
_notes.scoringSource: fpl = sum official FPL gameweek points per owned player.
